---
title: "test_mimir_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_mimir_empire.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 8.21
overall_score: 4.95
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMimirEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_files, test_scan_clean_file, test_scan_complex_file, test_scan_maintainability. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMimirEmpire, mock_root, test_scan_no_files, test_scan_clean_file, test_scan_complex_file, test_scan_maintainability. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)

### Exports
- `TestMimirEmpire`
- `mock_root`
- `test_scan_no_files`
- `test_scan_clean_file`
- `test_scan_complex_file`
- `test_scan_maintainability`
